title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: Flex seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to build and scale the operational backbone for its New Verticals division, expanding beyond rent into non-rent split-pay verticals. As the first dedicated RevOps hire for the division, you'll architect the GTM engine from scratch—Salesforce configuration, pipeline management, routing, reporting, and the full revenue tech stack. Requires 5+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops with 2 years senior capacity, deep Salesforce expertise, and familiarity with GTM systems like Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot.
score_reason: Excellent match on core RevOps requirements—15+ years B2B SaaS experience, Salesforce expertise, and proven GTM architecture skills align perfectly with building a revenue operations function from scratch. Remote location is ideal fit, and the fintech-adjacent (split-pay) vertical matches strong background, though lack of explicit Outreach/LeanData experience is minor gap.
ai_opener: I saw Flex is building out RevOps for New Verticals from the ground up—that's exactly the kind of greenfield GTM architecture I've scaled multiple times across B2B SaaS and fintech. With 15+ years architecting Salesforce-driven revenue engines and pipeline forecasting systems, I'm interested in how you're thinking about routing strategy and reporting infrastructure as you expand beyond rent into split-pay verticals.
